nodes.name: public_branch_diagnosis_f206ab.json
nodes.summary: Public branch diagnosis variant B (f206ab) - 66 lines JSON. Discovery returned 10 hits successfully (DDG working, error_type=none). All 10 fetches failed (fetch_success=0, fetch_error=10). Verdict correctly identifies discovery healthy, fetch stage as root cause. New additive fields verified: discovery_attempted, discovery_elapsed_s, discovery_error_type, fetch_attempted, fetch_success, fetch_error, pattern_hits. Recommendation: focus next sprint on fetch stage diagnostics to capture fetch err types in verdict.
keyFindings: F206AB taxonomy correctly identifies root cause at fetch stage
Recommendation: add fetch_error_type taxonomy similar to discovery err taxonomy

nodes.name: public_branch_fetch_compare_f206ag.json
nodes.summary: Public branch fetch comparison f206ag - 39 lines JSON. HTTP/2 smoke test results showing: api.github.com via httpx/h2 returns 200 with content_type=text/xml, bleepingcomputer.com via aiohttp returns 200 with content_type=text/xml. Methodology: isolated async_fetch_public_text with 15s timeout, no store write. Both transports functional in isolation.
keyFindings: Both transports functional in isolated test

nodes.name: public_branch_fetch_diagnosis_f206ac.json
nodes.summary: Public branch fetch diagnosis f206ac - 112 lines JSON. Detailed diagnostic showing F206AC verification: probe_public_fetcher_retry_green=true, fetch_error_types_in_verdict=true, fetch_error_samples_bounded_max_5=true, per_url_samples_no_body=true, classify_fetch_error_tested=true, new_tests_24_pass=true, regression_219_pass_1_pre_existing=true. httpx_h2 multiplexed connections may be in bad state - recommendation to add httpx_h2 circuit breaker or revert to aiohttp as default when curl_cffi disabled.
keyFindings: F206AC verification: all checks pass (retry green, error types in verdict, bounded samples)
httpx_h2 connection pool may be in bad state - degradation observed
Recommendation: httpx_h2 circuit breaker OR revert to aiohttp as default when curl_cffi disabled
24 new tests pass, 219 regression tests pass (1 pre-existing)

nodes.name: public_branch_fetch_diagnosis_post_f206af_h2_on.json
nodes.summary: Post-H2 enabled diagnosis f206af - 25 lines JSON. Phase: PHASE3_LIVE_PUBLIC_DIAGNOSTIC_H2_ENABLED. Discovered=0, fetched=0, matched_patterns=0, accepted_findings=0. httpx_h2_auto_disabled=false, httpx_h2_failure_count=0. should_use_httpx_h2_samples shows api.github.com=api_like=true, bleepingcomputer=clearnet_default=false. Environmental issue (DuckDuckGo backend_error) causing 0 discovery - not transport regression.
keyFindings: 0 discovery due to environmental DuckDuckGo backend_error - not transport
api.github.com eligible for httpx_h2, bleepingcomputer not (clearnet_default transport)

nodes.name: public_fetch_stage_diagnosis_f206ac.json
nodes.summary: Public fetch stage diagnosis f206ac - 38 lines JSON. Verifies fetch_error_counted_at=pipeline/live_public_pipeline.py:2582. New fields in verdict: verdict_has_fetch_error_types=true, verdict_has_fetch_error_samples=true. Phase_2 classify_fetch_error tested successfully.
